title: T-043 — Scheduler Run History index UI
prompt:
# T-043 — Scheduler Run History index UI

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §8.1 SCR-07-04, §17.1 PLE-001, §18 matrix.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create the run history browser that planners use to audit solver runs and start a safe re-run flow.

## Implementation contract
Use T-013 API/loader data, display 50/page, surface errors/fallbacks, and deep-link to run detail. Re-run opens T-045 modal, never directly commits.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/runs filterable run history index with KPI cards and Re-run entry point.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_run_history. Includes run_type Schedule/Dry Run filter per OQ-EXT-09, server-side pagination, duration badges, and RBAC disabling of re-run for non-Planners/failed runs.
acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/runs renders, then KPI cards/table/filter bar match pext_run_history prototype parity.
Given run_type=dry_run filter is selected, then only preview/dry-run rows are listed and URL state is preserved.
Given a failed run or non-Planner user, then Re-run is disabled in UI and rejected server-side.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for filters, dry-run filter, RBAC disabled re-run.
risk_red_lines: Do not reuse source run_id for re-runs.
Do not load unpaginated two-year history.
Do not show P2-only actions as active without feature flags.
